detail: Skill describes validate CLI but scripts/zera_validate.sh does not exist in antigravity-core. Cannot be fixed without Artem approval for script creation.
Skill describes critic CLI but scripts/zera_critic.sh does not exist in antigravity-core. Cannot be fixed without Artem approval for script creation.
References three non-existent paths in antigravity-core: configs/qwen/, zera-qwen-wrapper.sh, qwen-integration/. Skill references are aspirational — Qwen CLI exists but integration layer does not.

CLI tools referenced in skills but not installed. These are macOS-specific (imsg, remindctl, memo) or require specific setup (blogwatcher, himalaya, yq). Either install or update skills with install instructions.
All 111 skills have unique names — no duplicate naming issues.
pytorch-fsdp (160KB) and research-paper-writing (103KB) are scraper-generated with legitimate content. No action needed.
meta-memory.json missing since cycle 1. Priority: create it with architecture, patterns, quality, open_loops, next_priorities categories.
zera-self-evolution-runner skill should merge into autonomous-ai-agents category per skill-audit recommendation.
